name: sf-date-range-picker
title: SF Date Range Picker
description: Industrial date range picker — read-only SFInput trigger + SFPopover panel + SFCalendarLazy (P3 lazy boundary inherited; react-day-picker stays out of homepage First Load JS) + optional left-rail presets + optional inline time inputs. classNames-only styling with rounded-none + bg-primary/text-primary-foreground for selected. Zero new runtime deps. Locale is type-only.
